column1: # OWASP ZAP alert policy for the automated DAST release gate (ADR-0069).
# zap-api-scan.py runs read this via `-c rules.tsv`. The CI step blocks a release
# on a FAIL-level alert (exit 1); WARN-level findings are uploaded as reports for
# triage. Promote a WARN to FAIL here to make it block; IGNORE a reviewed
# false-positive (with a reason) so the gate stays a true 0-FAIL signal.

column3: Non-Storable Content on 401 responses is correct: auth failures are intentionally non-cacheable and the JSON API serves no static/robots/sitemap content (audit-0.29.0).

column1: # --- Security-critical active rules promoted to FAIL (block the release) ---
